headline: Michael Dell Among Top Net Wealth Gainers In 2026 — Back In Top 10 Richest, Even After Giving Away $6.25 Billion To Trump Accounts
summary: Billionaire Michael Dell and his wife, Susan, were among the supporters of the Trump Accounts for children to get an early start on their savings. While the Dells gave away $6.25 billion in late 2025, the Dell Technologies CEO is enjoying a nice boost to his net worth in 2026. Dell Jumps Back Into The Top 10 Michael Dell has been a prominent figure on the top 10 billionaires list from Bloomberg for the past several years, but fell just shy of 10th place to end 2025.
